message:
fix: Optimize Range request efficiency for remote datasets

- Default prefetch to false in RemoteLanceDataset.open() to avoid
  downloading all fragments when opening a dataset
- Skip IVF index loading for fragment files (URLs containing /data/)
  since index is loaded at dataset level
- Add global cache for IVF indexes to prevent duplicate loads
- Fix test tracker to exclude HEAD requests (they return 200 with
  content-length but no body, giving false full-download counts)
- Use named import for LanceQL in example page (default export is vault)

LIMIT 10 query now downloads <1% of dataset instead of 100%+
